name: ALDECI Critical Alert Escalation

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ alert_id: $('Webhook Trigger').first().json.id, org_id: $('Webhook Trigger').first().json.org_id || 'default', auto_escalate: true }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'escalated', alert_id: $('Webhook Trigger').first().json.id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

_comment: Webhook URL after import: http://localhost:5678/webhook/aldeci-critical-alert. POST JSON: {id, severity, title, description, source, org_id, risk_score}
